parameters.query:
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.email,
  s.first_name,
  s.last_name,
  s.province_preference,
  s.max_budget,
  s.min_bedrooms,
  s.property_type_preference,
  s.subscribed_at
FROM email_subscribers s
WHERE s.active = true
AND s.unsubscribed_at IS NULL
AND (s.last_email_sent IS NULL OR s.last_email_sent < NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days')
ORDER BY s.subscribed_at DESC
LIMIT 500;

SELECT 
  p.listing_id,
  p.title,
  p.price,
  p.bedrooms,
  p.bathrooms,
  p.property_type,
  p.suburb,
  p.city,
  p.province,
  p.size_sqm,
  p.url,
  p.source,
  p.images
FROM properties p
WHERE p.status = 'active'
AND p.price > 0
AND p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 200;
